name: music-metadata-mcp
description: MCP server for the FreqBlog Music API — 23 tools covering audio features, honestly-labelled tags, recommendations (Spotify /recommendations + related-artists replacement), harmonic radio, DJ transition scoring + setlist ordering, DJ-format export (Rekordbox/M3U/cuesheet), country charts, lyrics, waveforms and more. Drop-in Spotify audio-features replacement for AI workflows.
author: FreqBlog <hello@freqblog.com>
